case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROP SUBJ DISP $4,069.00 U.S. CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROP SUBJ DISP $4,069.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $4,069.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY TONY TAMBURELLO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS EUGENE PALERMO, LAURIE CLINTON AND KYE RORIE IV, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $445.00 US CURRENCY HELD IN THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT PROPERTY ROOM UNDER POLICE REPORT # 030-513-681 BE RELEASED TO ATTY TONY TAMBURELLO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT EUGENE RODERICK - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO PAYOUT MONEY FILED BY PETITIONER
